title: Nezumi Steals Nami’s Hope
scene: On pages 1–4, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Luffy’s crew moves closer to Nami’s truth while Arlong’s crew treats the island as their possession.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong Park's main entrance

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Doo Doo DAH Doo:

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Looks like it's about time!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: MOMO! Time for your meal!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Sniff sniff

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Huh? What's that trumpet noise I heard just now...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That's strange...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What's with him!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Roasted pig should be his favourite!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Maybe he already had his meal...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Well, I'll just eat this then!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Was that... you who blew that trumpet just now?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: NYU!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: W-Who are you!? Who, me? I'm Hacchan!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You can call me HACH!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: So you're a fishman too?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yup, yup! I'm a charming octopus fishman!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I feel like I've seen you before...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Are you with the marines? Or are you a guest?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Guest?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Yeah... I'm probably more of a guest.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: But you know, Arlong's not here right now.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yeah, he's not.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Where'd he go?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: It seems that this long nosed intruder got away from us.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: We already have one of his companions tied up here,

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: But Arlong went to Cocoyashi Village to go catch the other human!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Must be usopp... well, I guess I'll go save him in the meanwhile...

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: How can I get to that village?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Get on! You're a guest, aren't you? I'll give you a lift!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What's that?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's huge...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Aghhhhh!

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
